HTML template for creating a new blog post with fields for title and body.

# Purpose
This template file is used in a web application to define the structure of a page for creating a new post. It extends a base template, `base.html`, and defines three blocks: `header`, `title`, and `content`. The `header` block contains an `h1` element with a nested `title` block that defaults to "New Post". The `content` block includes a form with fields for a post's title and body, using data from the `request.form` object to pre-fill the fields. The form uses the POST method to submit data, and includes a submit button labeled "Save".
